description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a predominantly metallic gray upper receiver and barrel assembly, contrasted by a black polymer stock and grip. The stock is robust and textured, likely for improved shoulder support and handling, while the grip is ergonomically shaped for comfort. A red accent panel with a digital display or control interface is visible on the lower receiver, suggesting electronic or smart functionality. The rifle is equipped with a compact optical sight mounted on the top rail, enhancing aiming precision. The barrel is short and squared-off, with a vented or ported muzzle, and the overall build appears solid and durable, suitable for urban tactical scenarios. The magazine is not externally visible, possibly integrated or internal, and the rifle's surfaces are mostly matte with some sleek, smooth finishes.
description: A modern tactical rifle with a gray metallic upper, black polymer stock and grip, red accent panel, and a compact optical sight. The design is robust, with a short, squared barrel and digital interface.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the gray upper, black stock and grip, red accent panel, and mounted sight.
description_view_1: Front view emphasizing the squared-off barrel, vented muzzle, and the compact width of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the stock, grip, and sight, as well as the digital panel.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the textured buttstock and the alignment of the sight along the top rail.
